item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Kebijakan yang memprioritaskan kepentingan masyarakat tanpa melibatkan dialog atau partisipasi masyarakat bisa justru mengabaikan hak-hak dasar warga.

notes: Agent A begins with clear agreement that society should often be prioritized, then shifts by turn 3 toward a justice-and-rights balance and by turn 5 criticizes repressive public-order enforcement. Agent B stays closer to a rights-safeguard/balance position throughout, while acknowledging that stability and legal flexibility can matter. Agent A's visible movement is larger, so drift is toward Agent B.
